description: An on-site quality control inspector is verifying that solar panel installations meet technical specifications.

nodes.task_description: Select a random sample of installed solar panel strings for inspection.

expected_outcome.value: Inspector uses a tool to randomly select 5% of the strings.

nodes.task_description: For each sampled string, use a torque wrench to verify that the bolts are tightened to the manufacturer's specification.

expected_outcome.value: Inspector performs and logs the results of the torque tests.

nodes.task_description: Perform an I-V curve trace on the strings to ensure their electrical performance is as expected.

expected_outcome.value: Inspector captures and analyzes the I-V curve, confirming performance is within spec.

nodes.task_description: If any failures are found, create a punch list item for the construction contractor to correct the issue.

expected_outcome.value: Inspector finds one string with a loose connection and creates a formal punch list item.
